tender.description: Under the Business Plan 2026-27 scheme, work of installing 33 kV LA, 33 kV PT, 11 kV relay and battery and battery charger at 33/11 kV power substations Transport Nagar, DM Road and Anupshahr Adda Bulandshahr.
